## Hour 08

### Urolithin A gets absorbed

You've just begun taking Mitopure and it's already springing into action. Urolithin A levels peak in your bloodstream, targeting key organs like your muscles.

![Day 02](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/f27972b865697f072681031ce51ed605154c6bb0-1776x1776.png?w=3840&h=3840&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

## Day 02

### Cellular recycling is activated

Mitopure® stimulates mitophagy, a potent recycling and cleansing mechanism that rejuvenates the mitochondria, the energy factories in your cells.

![Day 30](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/a77e335d1c979ad5cda23a5f4062131c043e19e6-1776x1776.png?w=3840&h=3840&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

## Day 30

### New healthy mitochondria

One month in, your cells are transforming. Damaged mitochondria are removed and healthier ones are produced in a process called mitochondrial biogenesis.

![Day 60](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/1dcfb9b2d7888b53b8252afe1f15c0dac784921a-1776x1776.png?w=3840&h=3840&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

### Enhanced cellular renewal

With our mitochondria recharged and renewed, the cells throughout your body are starting to function optimally.

### Increased muscle strength\*

## Frequently asked questions

Mitopure is a breakthrough supplement clinically proven to renew aging cells. A pure and patented form of the longevity nutrient Urolithin A, it works by converting cellular damage into energy, for improved muscle function, recovery and more.

Mitopure gummies are an easy, tasty way to get your daily dose of cellular rejuvenation.

Take 2 gummies daily for the foundational daily dose, or 4 gummies daily for 1000mg Mitopure. Gummies can be taken with meals or on an empty stomach. For optimal results, use consistently for at least four months and beyond.

Yes, you can combine gummies with another form of Mitopure (2 softgels or 1 stickpack of Berry Powder) as long as you do not exceed the maximum recommended dose of 1000mg/day.

Mitopure Gummies are vegan, gluten-free and sugar-free. They are made without milk, eggs, nuts, crustaceans, shellfish, wheat, soy and sesame.

Mitopure Gummies contain no artificial sweeteners, colors or flavors. They are sweetened with Reb M, which is a natural ingredient derived from stevia.

Muscle function starts to decline in our 30s as our mitochondria - our cellular powerhouses - start to break down and lose their efficiency. Mitopure is important because it activates a potent cellular recycling and renewal mechanism called mitophagy. This process cleans up defective mitochondria and allows the mitochondria to repair itself and improve its performance.

Timeline is intended for healthy adults, ages 18 and up.

We do not recommend taking more than 1000mg of Mitopure per day.

# Mitopure User Guide: Elevate Your Urolithin A Experience

Discover how to maximize your Mitopure® routine for enhanced cellular health, and improved energy with practical tips for everyday use.

![man and woman with Urolithin A Softgels](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/49bb4271a3cdcb8d6c4d4e24cc4310b5ff73dc96-6720x4480.jpg?w=3840&h=2560&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

## What to know

* Mitopure, a highly pure form of Urolithin A, promotes mitochondrial health, which is essential for improving energy levels, muscle strength, and endurance.
* For optimal results, users should take 500mg to 1000mg of Mitopure daily. Mitopure comes in three clinically validated forms, softgels, gummies and powder, to easily fit into your routine.
* While some users report feeling more energetic within 4-8 weeks, maximum benefits like improved muscle health may take several months, as Mitopure works at the cellular level.
* Mitopure has been extensively studied and is third-party tested, making it a reliable supplement for supporting mitochondrial and overall health.

Incorporating Mitopure® into your daily life is a transformative step towards unparalleled cellular health.

Whether you choose the convenient softgels, tasty gummies, or the versatile powder, this guide will teach you everything you need to know about using Mitopure effectively, maximizing its benefits, and seamlessly integrating it into your lifestyle.

![Urolithin A](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/2ef4679d1e91ca3a8d2700f7ecafe20e2cc145e4-2640x1760.jpg?w=3840&h=2560&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

## What is Mitopure?

Before we dive into the specifics, let's briefly recap what Mitopure is.

[Mitopure](https://www.timeline.com/science) is a highly pure form of Urolithin A, a powerful compound that has been extensively studied for its potential to support mitochondrial health, enhance [muscle strength](https://www.timeline.com/blog/new-study-shows-exercise-like-effects-of-urolithin-a), and even slow down [skin aging](https://www.timeline.com/blog/what-happens-when-skin-ages) when applied topically.

Developed by Timeline after over 15 years of research, Mitopure is the first and only clinically proven Urolithin A supplement available on the market.

Let’s explore how to make the most of your Mitopure experience!

![Mitopure softgels](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/aeb56f8a45ff8a6e28775a7f337dcba4753820af-2640x1760.jpg?w=3840&h=2560&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

### Dosage and Timing for Mitopure Softgels

To achieve the best results with [Mitopure softgels](https://www.timeline.com/products/mitopure-softgels-vegan), follow the recommended dosage and timing:

Recommended Dose: Mitopure is most effective at doses of 500mg or 1000mg per day. Two softgels provide 500mg while four softgels provide 1000mg of Urolithin A.

How to Take Mitopure: For the best results, take Mitopure daily, ideally at the same time every day. Mitopure can be taken at any time during the day, and you can take the softgels with or without food.

[Clinical studies](https://www.timeline.com/studies) have found that Mitopure is well-tolerated and safe in doses up to 1000mg daily. We do not recommend taking more than 1000mg of Mitopure a day.

### Dosage and Timing for Mitopure Berry Powder

To achieve the best results with Mitopure Berry Powder, follow the recommended dosage and timing:

Recommended Dose: Mitopure is most effective at doses of 500mg or 1000mg per day. One stick pack provides 500mg, while two stick packs provide 1000mg of Urolithin A.

How to Take Mitopure: For the best results, take Mitopure daily, ideally at the same time every day. Mitopure can be taken at any time during the day.

### How Do I Use Mitopure Berry Powder

Mixing and taking Mitopure powder is straightforward. Follow these steps for the best results:

* Mitopure Powder is best when mixed into foods. Some of our favorite ways are in smoothies, yogurt, oatmeal, or chia pudding.
* Mitopure Powder does not mix well in water.
* Stir well until fully dissolved.

### What Does Mitopure Berry Powder Taste Like?

Mitopure berry powder has a tart berry flavor with no added sugar or sweeteners, giving it a natural and refreshing taste.

## What Will I Feel When Taking Mitopure?

Many users report increased energy levels within 4–8 weeks of consistent use of Mitopure. However, the full benefits, such as improved muscle strength, may take several months to be realized as cellular health improves gradually over time. While everyone may not physically feel the benefits, our clinical trials have shown that Mitopure triggers the mitochondrial recycling process, called [mitophagy](https://www.timeline.com/blog/an-explainer-on-mitophagy-the-process-that-keeps-our-cells-healthy), after one month.

## How Long Should I Take Mitopure?

For optimal benefits, based on our clinical trials, we recommend you take Mitopure for a minimum of 4 months to support mitochondrial function and muscle health. Many of our customers choose to stay on Mitopure indefinitely to support their long-term mitochondrial health.

## Can I Switch Between Softgels, Gummies and Powder?

Yes, you can switch between forms. Remember, though, that two softgels and two gummies provide 500mg of Urolithin A while one stick pack of powder provides 500mg of Urolithin A.

## How to Store Mitopure

Here are some storage tips that ensure your Mitopure stays effective:

* Store the bottle in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.
* Always keep the lid tightly closed when not in use.

## Safety and Precautions

Mitopure is FDA GRAS-approved. However, always consult with a healthcare professional before starting any supplement, especially if you have any pre-existing health conditions or are taking medications.

Mitopure is not recommended for use during pregnancy, breastfeeding, or in children without medical advice.
